decision_needed: Approve or reject the locked arm_m0_min CPU requirement packet before final signoff. Approval promotes the reviewed packet into arm_m0_min/req/; rejection reopens SSOT scope.
next_action: Human reviewer approves or rejects arm_m0_min/doc/arm_m0_min_requirement_review.md. If approved, run workflow/req-gen/scripts/promote_requirement_review.py and rerun workflow/sim_debug/scripts/audit_fl_rtl_equivalence_goal.py.

options.label: Approve locked minimal CPU scope
options.result: Promote arm_m0_min/doc/arm_m0_min_requirement_review.md into arm_m0_min/req/, resolve this review decision, and rerun final audit.

options.label: Reject and reopen SSOT scope
options.result: Keep final audit blocked, reopen SSOT requirements, and update CPU scope before rerunning downstream workflow stages.

review_summary.machine_evidence: SSOT, RTL compile, DUT lint, cocotb sim, FL-vs-RTL compare, and function/cycle coverage are green.
review_summary.remaining_blocker: Human approval of the locked requirement packet.
review_summary.scope_warning: Approve only if the intended CPU is a minimal ARMv6-M-like teaching/reference CPU without interrupts, privilege, debug, MPU/MMU/cache, NVIC, or SysTick.
